overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a gritty industrial warehouse district and transitioning through elevated highways toward a neon-lit downtown core during golden hour. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and atmospheric haze typical of the game's dystopian Night City setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse complex with covered loading areas

events.description: exiting covered warehouse area into open industrial yard
steering right to navigate around concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow industrial corridors and emerging into wider loading areas

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with corrugated metal roofing and loading bays
yellow and white striped concrete dividers lining the road edge
exposed industrial piping and ductwork attached to building exterior
heavy industrial crane with orange painted beams visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered industrial warehouse district with concrete barriers and metal structures. The vehicle navigates narrow corridors between industrial buildings, passing orange crane structures and concrete walls as it emerges from the sheltered area into a more open industrial yard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial storage yard with fuel tanks and processing equipment

events.description: entering open industrial zone with large cylindrical storage tanks
making left turn around industrial equipment and barriers

agents.ego_description: cruising through open industrial areas, maneuvering around storage tanks and barriers

entered.detail: large white cylindrical industrial storage tanks with metal stairways
tall yellow gantry crane used for loading cargo containers
tall industrial chimneys emitting faint smoke against the sky
shipping container with blue paint and yellow hazard stripes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a wide-open industrial storage yard dominated by large cylindrical tanks and gantry cranes. Smokestacks rise in the mid-distance while the camera navigates around blue shipping containers and concrete barriers, transitioning from enclosed warehouse corridors to open industrial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial highway with overpasses and utility infrastructure

events.description: ascending onto elevated highway with metal overpass structures
approaching and passing under large overpass gantry

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto elevated highway, passing under overpasses and alongside power infrastructure

notable_agents.action: distant car traveling in same direction on the highway

entered.detail: large metal and concrete highway overpass with support pillars
concrete jersey barriers with metal railings separating highway lanes
large commercial advertisement screen on industrial building
high-tension electrical transmission towers and cables spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto an elevated industrial highway, passing under massive overpass structures. Power lines and transmission towers dominate the skyline while concrete barriers line the road. The distant city skyline becomes visible on the horizon as the industrial zone recedes.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional highway passing under overpasses with emerging neon signage

events.description: passing under overpass causing brief shadow transition
neon signs and holographic advertisements become visible indicating downtown approach

agents.ego_description: weaving through highway curves, passing under multiple overpasses while approaching the neon-lit district

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement with pink and blue neon lighting
distant cluster of high-rise buildings and skyscrapers
floating holographic display projecting product advertisements in the air
modern glass facade building with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The highway passes under a series of overpasses creating alternating light and shadow. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements begin appearing on the periphery, signaling the transition from industrial zone to downtown. The city skyline grows larger ahead while traffic density increases slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown neon canyon with towering skyscrapers and holographic displays

events.description: entering dense urban canyon with towering neon-lit skyscrapers
ambient lighting shifts to dominant neon glow from surrounding advertisements

agents.ego_description: cruising through the neon-lit downtown canyon, observing holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk alongside the highway

entered.detail: tall building covered in bright neon signage and LED displays
large three-dimensional holographic projection floating above street level
multi-level highway interchange with ramps and overpasses
large vertical neon sign with bright pink and cyan illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the downtown core, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon signage and holographic advertisements. The lighting shifts to a dominant neon glow with pink and cyan hues reflecting off glass facades. The highway becomes an urban canyon with elevated roads and ramps visible, while pedestrians appear on the sidewalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a gritty, enclosed industrial district into the vibrant, neon-lit heart of a futuristic downtown core. It begins by navigating narrow corridors between concrete barriers and metal structures inside a covered warehouse district, gradually emerging into an open storage yard filled with cylindrical tanks and gantry cranes. As the vehicle accelerates, the scene shifts from the industrial yard onto an elevated highway, passing under massive overpasses and transmission towers while the distant city skyline first appears on the horizon. The environment then evolves as the highway moves through alternating light and shadow, with holographic advertisements beginning to flicker on the periphery. Finally, the camera enters a dense urban canyon of towering skyscrapers, where the industrial gray gives way to a dominant neon glow of pink and cyan reflecting off glass facades.
